action_set_definitions.name: get_robot_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of a specific robot including location [x, y], battery_level (0-100), and carrying_sku_id.

robot_id.description: The unique ID of the robot.

action_set_definitions.name: get_grid_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the storage grid at a specific coordinate to see if an SKU is present.

action_set_definitions.name: get_system_time
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the current cumulative system timestamp.

action_set_definitions.name: scan_for_empty_slot
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the coordinates of the nearest empty grid slot for temporary relocation of obstructing items.

action_set_definitions.name: charge_robot
action_set_definitions.description: Commands the robot to go to the nearest charging station and charge to a specific battery percentage. Updates system_timestamp and robot location.

action_set_definitions.name: move_robot
action_set_definitions.description: Moves the robot to a target coordinate. Consumes battery (1% per distance unit) and time.

action_set_definitions.name: pickup_sku
action_set_definitions.description: Robot picks up the SKU at its current location.

action_set_definitions.name: dropoff_sku
action_set_definitions.description: Robot drops off the currently carried SKU at the current coordinate.

state_description.robots: A map of robot IDs to their current status including 'location' (x, y), 'battery_level', and 'carrying_sku_id'.
state_description.storage_grid: A mapping of coordinate strings (e.g., 'x,y') to SKU information currently stored there.
state_description.order_queue: A list of pending retrieval or storage tasks containing SKU ID and target destination.
state_description.system_timestamp: The cumulative simulation steps or time elapsed in the environment.
